mapper.sql: r.id, r.pet_id, r.pet_type, r.age, r.weight, r.temperature, r.heart_rate, r.respiration_rate, r.appetite, r.mental_status, r.hair_condition, r.feces_status, r.vaccine_status, r.deworming_status, r.health_score, r.risk_level, r.ai_advice, r.remark, r.inspection_date, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.pet_name, r.owner_name

r.id, r.pet_id, r.pet_type, r.age, r.weight, r.temperature, r.heart_rate, r.respiration_rate, r.appetite, r.mental_status, r.hair_condition, r.feces_status, r.vaccine_status, r.deworming_status, r.health_score, r.risk_level, r.ai_advice, r.remark, r.inspection_date, r.create_time, r.update_time, p.name as pet_name, u.username as owner_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_health_record ( pet_id, pet_type, age, weight, temperature, heart_rate, respiration_rate, appetite, mental_status, hair_condition, feces_status, vaccine_status, deworming_status, health_score, risk_level, ai_advice, remark, inspection_date, create_time, update_time, pet_name, owner_name ) VALUES ( #{petId}, #{petType}, #{age}, #{weight}, #{temperature}, #{heartRate}, #{respirationRate}, #{appetite}, #{mentalStatus}, #{hairCondition}, #{fecesStatus}, #{vaccineStatus}, #{dewormingStatus}, #{healthScore}, #{riskLevel}, #{aiAdvice}, #{remark}, #{inspectionDate}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{petName}, #{ownerName} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pet_health_record r LEFT JOIN pet p ON r.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM pet_health_record r LEFT JOIN pet p ON r.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE r.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY r.inspection_date DESC
SELECT FROM pet_health_record r LEFT JOIN pet p ON r.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE r.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY r.inspection_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM pet_health_record r ORDER BY r.inspection_date DESC
